source_title: Specific contribution of Reelin expressed by Cajal-Retzius cells or GABAergic interneurons to cortical lamination.
selection_note: Pre-cutoff Reelin literature supports interneuron-linked cortical arbor and lamination phenotypes.

source_title: Schizophrenia risk ZNF804A interacts with its associated proteins to modulate dendritic morphology and synaptic development.
selection_note: ZNF804A is retained as a core arbor rescue candidate because pre-cutoff schizophrenia work links it to dendritic morphology.

source_title: Type I bHLH Proteins Daughterless and Tcf4 Restrict Neurite Branching and Synapse Formation by Repressing Neurexin in Postmitotic Neurons.
selection_note: TCF4 remains a pre-cutoff arbor candidate because it constrains neurite branching in postmitotic neurons.

source_title: Probing the VIPR2 Microduplication Linkage to Schizophrenia in Animal and Cellular Models.
selection_note: VIPR2 microduplication work preserves a pre-cutoff dendritic morphology rescue signal in schizophrenia models.
